notes:
- User templates folder automatically created on app startup if it does not exist
- Release title auto-generated from CHANGELOG stats (e.g. "2 new features, 9 fixes")
- Fallback title "Maintenance release" when no CHANGELOG section found for the version
- Release notes showing empty sections when CHANGELOG had no entry for the tagged version
- CHANGELOG rewritten in English to avoid regex encoding issues with accented headings
- generate_release_notes.py updated to parse English headings (Added/Fixed/Changed/Internal)
- CI/CD: package.json version now auto-bumped by workflow from tag (no manual edit needed)
- CI/CD: commit back to main now includes both package.json and version.json
- Release title placeholder replaced automatically — no more "Titre de la release"
